name: Simulate CDC with Incremental Loads
description: Apply INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE CDC changes to a warehouse table and record the audit log

checks.name: 3 products remain after CDC
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM warehouse_products;

checks.name: Product 2 updated
checks.query: SELECT product_name, price FROM warehouse_products WHERE product_id = 2;
checks.description: Product 2 name and price updated per CDC record

checks.name: Product 3 deleted
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM warehouse_products WHERE product_id = 3;

checks.name: Product 4 inserted
checks.query: SELECT product_name FROM warehouse_products WHERE product_id = 4;
checks.description: New product Webcam must be inserted

checks.name: Audit log has 3 entries
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM cdc_audit_log;
checks.description: One audit log entry per CDC change applied
